twitter_thread: 65% of AUR malware infections come from just 5 packages. Lenucksi's tools detect 4 of them.
AUR supply-chain attacks have risen 30% since January, with 120 reported cases of atomic-lockfile.
Aur-malware-check reduces risk by 37%, but 40% of users are still on outdated dependencies.
Lenucksi's tool is 25% more effective than community Gists, detecting malware in 42% of tested packages.
1 in 42 AUR packages contains a backdoor. Assuming safety is a mistake.
A $443 AI-powered security gadget can detect 95% of AUR malware. Worth it?
What's your go-to method for securing AUR packages? #aisecurity #supplychain
